issues.description: Missing filter for 'no base effect' requirement. The official text specifies 'no base effect' but the DSL filter only checks maxPower.
Missing optional count specification 'up to 1'. While PlayFromHand may default to 1, explicitly specifying count: 1 and optional: true would be clearer.
Missing [Blocker] keyword in DSL. The card has the Blocker keyword which should be encoded separately.
